title: Table row actions — ... menu with Edit and Delete
description: Add the actions dropdown to each table row with Edit and Delete options, and wire up delete functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: Each table row has a '...' button in the Actions column
Clicking '...' opens a dropdown with 'Edit' and 'Delete' options
Clicking 'Delete' immediately deletes the entry and refreshes the table
Clicking 'Edit' opens the edit flow (implemented in TASK-26)
Deleted entry is removed from the table without a page reload

steps.description: Add actions dropdown to each table row
steps.details: In WeightTable.tsx, replace the placeholder Actions cell with a DropdownMenu. DropdownMenuTrigger: Button variant='ghost' size='icon' with lucide-react MoreHorizontal icon (the '...' icon). DropdownMenuContent: DropdownMenuItem 'Edit' and DropdownMenuItem 'Delete' with className='text-red-600'.

In WeightTable.tsx, add handleDelete(id: string) function: call deleteWeightEntry(id) from apiService, on success call onEntryDeleted() prop and re-fetch the current page. Show a loading state on the specific row being deleted (track deletingId state). Handle error with a toast or alert.
Log weight entries, click '...' on a row, take screenshot of open dropdown. Click Delete — verify entry disappears from table. Verify table page count updates if the last entry on a page was deleted.

technicalNotes: lucide-react MoreHorizontal is the standard '...' icon
Track which row is being deleted with deletingId state to show per-row loading states
